data.title: Robinhood's crypto trading volumes surged in July, but Bernstein suggests it's early in the bull cycle. Revenues up 46%, EBITDA margin 56%, total crypto trading volume fell 39%. Robinhood saw volumes spike to six-month highs in July.
data.description: Bernstein, an investment firm, stated in a recent report that the ongoing rally in digital assets is still in its early stages, maintaining a positive outlook on the overall crypto market despite a decline in second-quarter trading volumes. The firm emphasized that the crypto bull cycle is still in its early phases, as outlined in a note following Robinhood's Q2 earnings release. Despite relatively stable prices in Q2, Robinhood demonstrated strong performance, with revenues increasing by 46% year-over-year and an adjusted EBITDA margin rising to 56% from 51% in the previous quarter. Although total crypto trading volume dropped by 39% sequentially due to decreased market volatility, Bernstein highlighted a rebound in activity in July. In particular, Robinhood observed a surge in crypto volumes to six-month highs last month, indicating favorable momentum going into the second half of 2025. The analysts from Bernstein underscored the platform's capability to enhance crypto-related revenues and product offerings, suggesting positive growth prospects for the market ahead.

data.title: Inventor from Wisconsin creates DIGITAL STUDENT ID FOR BUSES to streamline bus route efficiency and reduce paperwork.
data.description: A resident of Pleasant Prairie, Wisconsin, and bus driver has introduced a new system named the DIGITAL STUDENT ID FOR BUSES in Pittsburgh on July 31, 2025. The system aims to ensure that every student boards the appropriate bus efficiently. By streamlining processes, the inventor intends to minimize paperwork and save time for transportation staff.

data.title: CNCF announces schedule for 10th anniversary KubeCon + CloudNativeCon North America in Atlanta from Nov. 10-13. Celebrating what's next for cloud native infrastructure.
data.description: The highly anticipated KubeCon + CloudNativeCon North America conference is set to take place from November 10th to 13th in Atlanta. This event will mark a significant milestone as the global community gathers to commemorate the 10th anniversary of the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF). Participants will delve into discussions about the future of cloud native infrastructure. The conference is organized by CNCF and will be held in Atlanta.

data.title: Materna Medical finishes enrolling 420 first-time mothers in EASE trial (NCT03973281) evaluating Ellora™ Obstetrical System's effectiveness.
data.description: Materna Medical, a women’s health company based in Mountain View, California, has recently completed enrollment in its EASE pivotal trial (NCT03973281). The trial involved 420 first-time mothers who participated in evaluating the safety and effectiveness of the Ellora™ Obstetrical System, an investigational solution aimed at reducing pelvic muscle injury during vaginal delivery. This study, known as the EASE trial, is prospective in nature and focuses on the potential benefits for first-time mothers. The completion of enrollment marks a significant milestone for Materna Medical and its ongoing efforts to address pelvic floor disorders.

data.title: Plan a summer getaway to Miami Beach for spa indulgences, culinary delights, and hotel deals. Perfect destination to relax.
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida, as of July 31, 2025, summer is still in full swing and remains the ideal time for a luxurious yet affordable vacation. This sought-after destination offers a variety of seasonal experiences, including diverse cuisine and significantly reduced prices on accommodations. With a wide range of options, visitors can enjoy the sun-soaked delights of Miami Beach without breaking the bank.

data.title: PG&E aims to meet 10GW data center demand, unlocking billions in benefits for California. CPUC approves interim rule for grid connections.
data.description: The California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) has given the green light to PG&E with an interim rule to speed up grid connections for high power users in Oakland. PG&E announced plans to meet 10 gigawatts (GW) of additional power demand from data centers. This proactive approach aligns with the company's efforts to keep pace with growing electricity demands.

data.title: NeuroOne® (NASDAQ: NMTC) to report Q3 fiscal year 2025 results on Aug 14 at 8:30 am ET, for the quarter ending June 30.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in EDEN PRAIRIE, NeuroOne Medical Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: NMTC) announced that they will disclose financial results for the fiscal third quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The release is scheduled before the market opens on August 14, 2025. NeuroOne aims to enhance surgical care options and outcomes for patients with neurological disorders. Stay tuned for the upcoming financial report from the Company.

data.title: Carvana beats Q2 estimates: revenue $4.84B, EBITDA $601M. Shares near 52-week high. BofA raises target to $425. Units sold up 41% to 143K.
data.description: Shares of Carvana Co (NYSE: CVNA) surged in early trading following the announcement of positive second-quarter earnings. The company reported revenues of $4.84 billion and EBITDA of $601 million, surpassing Street estimates of $4.58 billion and $553 million, respectively. Analyst Michael McGovern from BofA Securities maintained a Buy rating and raised the price target from $375 to $425. Carvana's unit sales grew by 41% year-on-year to 143,000, exceeding consensus by 1,600 units. Management anticipates a "sequential increase" in units for the third quarter. The full-year EBITDA guidance of $2-$2.2 billion aligns with expectations, indicating confidence in stable margins for the second half of the year. Carvana shares are on the verge of reaching their 52-week high, amidst an upbeat earnings season.

data.title: Tri Pointe Homes expands in Utah with 5 new communities, including Polaris at Terraine in West Jordan. Utah tops economic outlook.
data.description: In West Jordan, Utah, Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. unveiled its inaugural community in the state, Polaris at Terraine. This introduction signifies the start of a broader footprint in Utah, with five additional communities set to launch in Salt Lake, Utah, and Wasatch counties. This expansion caters to the flourishing state of Utah, which boasts the country's top economic outlook. Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. (NYSE: TPH), a prominent homebuilder, is making significant strides with this new development.

data.title: SiriusXM stock falls after Q2 miss with $1.63B subscriber revenue, $2.14B total revenue, 209k self-pay subscribers drop.
data.description: SiriusXM Holdings (NASDAQ: SIRI) saw a decline in stock value following the release of its fiscal second-quarter 2025 results. The company reported subscriber revenue of $1.63 billion for the quarter, a decrease from $1.66 billion in the same period last year. Overall quarterly revenue dropped 1.8% year-on-year to $2.14 billion, surpassing analyst projections of $2.13 billion. However, the company experienced a lower-than-expected GAAP EPS of 57 cents compared to the consensus estimate of 73 cents. Advertising revenue also showed a decline from $443 million to $432 million year-on-year. Self-pay subscribers for SiriusXM decreased by 209,000, totaling 31.28 million subscribers compared to 31.48 million in the previous year. The self-pay monthly churn rate remained constant year-on-year at 1.5%. Additionally, SiriusXM segment revenue dropped by 1.6% year over year.

data.title: Global cold chain market for pharmaceuticals to reach $9.6 billion by 2035 with a CAGR of 3.8%. Over 90 patents filed.
data.description: The market for pharmaceutical cold chain is projected to witness significant growth, as per a recent report available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Estimated at USD 6.38 billion in 2025, the industry is forecasted to reach USD 9.6 billion by 2035, translating to a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.8% during this period. The report delves into various aspects such as the distribution by the type of primary packaging, type of secondary packaging, type of usability, and key geographical regions influencing the market trends.

data.title: PharmaCorp voluntarily files Annual Information Form for year ended Dec 31, 2024; available on their website and SEDAR+.
data.description: In Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, PharmaCorp RX INC. (TSXV: PCRX) has voluntarily submitted its Annual Information Form (AIF) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. The AIF is now available for access on PharmaCorp's website, www.pharmacorprx.ca, and on the Corporation’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: Shake Shack stock down 16.6% as second quarter adjusted earnings per share beat analyst estimate. Quarterly sales at $356.466M.
data.description: Shares of Shake Shack, Inc. (NYSE: SHAK) have dropped by over 16.6% as of the latest update on Thursday. The burger chain reported adjusted earnings per share of 44 cents for the second quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of 37 cents. Additionally, quarterly sales amounted to $356.466 million, reflecting a 12.6% increase compared to the previous year and exceeding the Street's anticipated $352.299 million in sales. System-wide sales also experienced significant growth. For full details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CNH Industrial to report Q2 earnings on 08/01, EPS expected at $0.15. Investors hopeful for positive results.
data.description: CNH Industrial (NYSE: CNH) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on August 1, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.15 for the company. Investors are anticipating the report, with hopes of CNH Industrial exceeding expectations and providing optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Growth projected in Application Security Market with 14% CAGR from 2025-2029, reaching USD 55.99 billion by 2025.
data.description: An industry report titled "Application Security Market Opportunity and Future Growth Dynamics" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global application security market is expected to experience substantial expansion, with projections indicating it will reach a value of USD 55.99 billion by 2025, showcasing a strong annual growth rate of 15.6%. In 2020, the market had already shown promising growth trends.
